list.title: Mndandanda wa Matikiti
list.searchPlaceholder: Sakani pa ID ya Tikiti / Mutu

view.title: Tikiti {id}
view.subject: Mutu
view.emailDisabled: Imelo yanu ({email}) yachotsedwa. Chonde lumikizanani ndi
view.ipHelpText: Kulumikizika kukachokera ku adilesi ina ya IP. Chonde sinthani.
view.passwordEncrypted: Zinsinsi zikusungidwa mu databesi yosiyana yosintha.
view.ticketClosed: Tikiti ili latsekeredwa, kotero mayankho aletserwa. Ngati mukadakali mukufuna thandizo, musangele kutsegula tikiti latsopano ndipo tidzakusangalatsani.
view.replyHint: Kutsegula matikiti osiyana pa nkhawa zatsopano kuthandiza timu yathu kupanga mndandanda ndi kuzikhazikitsa mwachangu.

new.title: Tikiti Latsopano
new.subject: Mutu
new.subjectValidation: Chonde lowetsani mfotokozedwe wafupi wa nkhawa.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Zikomo kothandiza kusunga dongosolo la thandizo lowongoleka mwa kuika pempho limodzi pa tikiti.
new.descriptionValidation: Chonde lowetsani mfotokozedwe wokwanira wa nkhawa.
new.fileNote: Dziwani: Mafailo a zithunzi okha - mitundu ya gif/jpeg/png yololezedwa.
new.allowAccessLabel: Ndiloletsa InterServer kulowa ku seva yanga ndi kuchita zosintha
new.accessNote: Chonde dziwani: Mwa kutsegula pempho la thandizo InterServer ingafunike kulowa, kusanthula, kapena kusintha mafailo mu akaunti yanu. Zofunikira izi zikufunikira kuthandizira mwakampani. Pitirizani chabe ngati muvomera.
